tasks.description: Create a runnable v2.1 runtime scaffold with seven Docker services and health contract checks.

steps.description: Create Docker Compose with nginx, frontend, backend, postgres, redis, minio, and onlyoffice
Add environment schema, reverse-proxy config, and backend health endpoint
Write failing healthcheck tests, then implement to make them green

tasks.acceptance-criteria: Compose stack must include all v2.1 services. GET /health must return 200 and contain service_name and version fields. Frontend and backend containers must start with validated environment variables.

unit: Health contract function returns service_name and version fields for default in-memory config
Compose parser rejects missing required environment variables in unit configuration test

tasks.description: Build local account authentication with token versioning and PostgreSQL-backed logout invalidation.

steps.description: Create auth schemas, routers, and persistence models for users and token blacklist
Write login refresh logout tests for token rotation and blacklist behavior
Implement JWT issuance, refresh cookie handling, and logout invalidation
Integrate role and version checks in authentication middleware

tasks.acceptance-criteria: Login must return access and refresh tokens with secure cookie flags. Refresh flow must fail for blacklisted JTI or stale token_version. Logout must persist refresh JTI in PostgreSQL. Role checks must reject unauthorized access by default.

unit: Mock user store returns valid token when password hash matches and rejects invalid credentials
Refresh validator rejects JWT when token_version in DB is lower than token payload
Blacklisted refresh JTI must be treated as invalid in isolation tests
integration: Login endpoint writes refresh token to HTTP response with HttpOnly cookie while reading real bcrypt configuration
Logout endpoint writes JTI into PostgreSQL token_blacklist and subsequent refresh call is blocked

tasks.description: Implement backend-upload flow for size, type, checksum, deduplication, and file versioning.

steps.description: Create file validators, upload endpoint, and dedup/version persistence models
Add MinIO object layout and checksum-based duplicate handling tests
Trigger parse task asynchronously and persist initial parse_status state
Return deterministic responses for duplicate, reject, and success paths

tasks.acceptance-criteria: Upload must reject >10MB files, executable signatures, and unsafe filenames. Identical hash in same folder returns 409, same name with new hash creates a new version, and successful uploads trigger parse_status=processing asynchronously.

unit: Validator rejects oversized mock upload and records 413-like error for exact-size boundary checks
Sanitizer removes path separators and control characters from mock filenames and truncates safely
Dedup checker returns 409 when mock folder contains identical hash under same file path
integration: Upload endpoint writes original and markdown objects to MinIO and creates files and file_versions rows in PostgreSQL with current_version updates
Upload with mismatched hash under same filename creates version N+1 and emits background task invocation

tasks.description: Add MarkItDown parsing, chunking, vectorization, and RRF retrieval storage flow.

steps.description: Implement chunker and indexing service with strict input/output contracts
Persist doc_chunks and index_tree rows through async background tasks
Implement BM25 plus vector RRF ranking SQL with permission predicates
Handle vector failures by setting parse_status and preserving deterministic state

tasks.acceptance-criteria: Uploaded content must generate Markdown, chunk records, tsvector, and vectors when provider calls succeed. Retrieval must exclude unauthorized content. Vector failure must keep vector_ready=false and allow repeatable retry without duplicate rows.

unit: Chunker splits synthetic text into fixed token windows and preserves deterministic boundaries
RRF merge test with mock bm25 and vector candidates returns ordered top-N scores
parse_status transition sequence must follow pending -> processing -> normal/failed deterministically
integration: Background parse task stores parsed markdown and doc_chunks rows for real uploaded file fixtures
Hybrid retrieval query with real SQL returns only rows where user_id matches or is_public or read_allow contains requester id

tasks.description: Implement ONLYOFFICE single-user edit sessions, callback persistence, and immediate reindexing.

steps.description: Add edit session table or cache map with version and token binding
Expose edit start endpoint that validates permission and returns editor config
Handle callback status 2/6 with version checks and new version writes
Trigger immediate parse reindex after successful callback save

tasks.acceptance-criteria: Only owner, admin, dept manager, and shared-edit grantees can open edit sessions. Callback must reject stale version tokens and duplicate saves without creating duplicate versions. Save success must append to file_versions, update files.current_version, and queue reindex immediately.

unit: Mock callback payload with missing token returns error 1 and no version writes
Mock second callback for the same session returns idempotent response and does not duplicate file_versions
Permission checker with mocked user roles allows editable for owner/admin/manager/shared-can-edit and denies read-only users
integration: Start-edit endpoint stores session against current file version and onlyoffice payload downloads the current content from MinIO
Real callback flow writes new object to MinIO, updates file_versions and files.current_version, and triggers indexing task

tasks.description: Build folder permissions, share defaults, admin controls, and retrieval visibility synchronization.

steps.description: Create folder permission CRUD and default shared-can-edit behavior
Sync permission grants into doc_chunks.read_allow during updates
Add admin-only endpoints with strict role guards and audit logging
Add policy tests for isolation and cross-user access boundaries

tasks.acceptance-criteria: Default sharing must be editable unless explicitly set can_edit=false. Retrieval and folder listing must only expose files owned, authorized by folder rule, or public. Admin-only APIs must reject non-admin users, and every permission-related mutation must create audit records.

unit: Permission service returns deny for user without grant when using mock rule store
Default shared permission must set allow_edit=true in permission model unit tests
Audit writer receives structured payload for grant and revoke actions
integration: Grant/revoke API updates folder_permissions and doc_chunks.read_allow in PostgreSQL
Admin role guard blocks standard user requests against admin routes while normal user endpoints remain accessible

tasks.description: Build provider failover, sanitized outbound payloads, and streaming chat with citations.

steps.description: Create provider router with timeout and retry strategy for 3 attempts
Add outbound payload sanitizer for chunk content and metadata redaction
Implement SSE chat endpoint with skill routing and citation fields
Add exact-match cache path for public query answers

tasks.acceptance-criteria: Routing must retry up to three times on timeout, 429, and 5xx before provider failover. Outbound calls must carry only sanitized text snippets and context, never full file content or user identifiers. Chat responses must stream SSE chunks including citations.

unit: Provider router chooses backup after three mocked primary failures and increments retry counters correctly
Sanitizer removes filename, user identity, and full-document blocks from outbound payload mocks
Exact-match cache returns immediate answer for repeated trimmed query within TTL
integration: Streaming endpoint combines retrieval results from real index query and produces ordered citation IDs in SSE frames
Failover test against real HTTP client wrapper confirms fallback provider is called after full retry budget is reached

tasks.description: Deliver chat, file manager, and admin pages with permission-aware API contracts.

steps.description: Create route shell with auth checks and permission-aware side navigation
Implement file upload, tree browsing, and version list components with mocked API types
Embed ONLYOFFICE iframe for single-user edit session and save callback handling
Add admin users, departments, permissions, and audit pages

tasks.acceptance-criteria: Chat page must stream SSE answers and display citations. File manager must handle upload and version actions with permission-based controls. Admin pages must enforce admin-only access and show audit, user, and permission states.

unit: Chat component test with mocked stream parser displays chunks and citation badges correctly
File tree component hides actions when mocked API denies edit rights
Admin guard test blocks management routes for non-admin identity
integration: Render file manager with real backend stubs to verify tree navigation maps to API responses and upload form posts multipart payloads
Open edit flow against mock editor endpoint and callback handler sends correct file_id and token

tasks.description: Add hardening, runbooks, and load checks for reproducible v2.1 deployment.

steps.description: Build backup/restore scripts for PostgreSQL, Redis, and MinIO
Add compose health probes and startup order constraints for all services
Publish deployment runbooks and incident response run flow
Define and execute smoke k6 checks for target latency and throughput

tasks.acceptance-criteria: Deployment stack must pass startup checks for all seven services on clean environment. Backup and restore scripts must restore schema, object data, and cache snapshot. Runbook steps must complete and include rollback actions for failed indexing and editor callback incidents.

unit: Compose configuration unit checker validates required services and explicit health checks
Backup script dry-run test verifies command generation without destructive execution
integration: Start full docker compose, run smoke health checks, and confirm service dependencies settle within timeout
Load smoke test against API endpoints meets baseline response budgets for chat and file list
e2e-manual: Validate operational runbooks by simulating one failed callback and one search outage, then follow documented recovery steps

tasks.description: Replace frontend demo session with real login, token persistence, and refresh lifecycle.

steps.description: Add login page and session bootstrap flow from backend auth endpoints
Persist access token and refresh lifecycle handling in frontend session state
Protect routes with authenticated session redirects and logout handling
Add tests for login success, unauthorized handling, and token refresh behavior

tasks.acceptance-criteria: Users can log in via UI and access protected pages only after successful authentication. Frontend no longer relies on hardcoded demo-access-token defaults. Expired or invalid sessions redirect to login and can recover via refresh or re-login.

tasks.task: Replace Frontend Mock APIs With Backend Endpoints
tasks.description: Remove frontend mock data paths and connect file, admin, and audit views to real backend APIs.

steps.description: Implement missing backend endpoints required by frontend admin and file views
Replace mocked client methods with real HTTP calls and typed responses
Update UI loading and error states for real network behavior
Add integration tests to verify end-to-end data rendering without mocks

tasks.acceptance-criteria: File versions, admin users, departments, and audit states are loaded from backend APIs. Frontend client no longer contains mock return blocks for production paths. Core pages remain functional with network success and failure handling.

tasks.description: Introduce i18n infrastructure and convert existing English UI copy to Chinese-first bilingual resources.

steps.description: Add i18n framework and locale resource files for zh-CN and en
Replace hardcoded UI strings in chat, files, admin, and shared components
Set default locale to Chinese with optional English switch
Add tests to verify translation rendering and locale switch behavior

tasks.acceptance-criteria: Default UI language is Chinese across major pages. English language remains available via switch or configuration. No major user-facing hardcoded English strings remain in primary workflows.

tasks.description: Create production-ready environment templates, initialization scripts, and deployment prerequisites.

steps.description: Add .env.production.example with secure required variables and guidance
Provide bootstrap script for initial admin user and essential seed records
Document pre-launch checklist for secrets, storage, auth, and observability
Add validation checks to prevent unsafe defaults in production startup

tasks.acceptance-criteria: Project includes production env template with no insecure defaults. Operators can initialize first admin account through documented script. Runbook clearly lists must-have pre-launch checks and failure rollback basics.
